title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 404.470 - Custodian designation by donor on present transfer, who may serve
text:
404.470.  Custodian designation by donor on present transfer, who may serve. — A donor making a present transfer of property to a beneficiary may designate and transfer the property to any adult person or financial institution, including the donor, as personal custodian for the beneficiary under sections 404.400 to 404.650.
(L. 1986 S.B. 651 § 4 subsec. 1)
